summary: Tested RMS Module API endpoints and Gelismis dropdown menu icons. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend RMS page loads correctly with KPI cards, demand chart, comp-set chart, and tables. All 8 Advanced modules in Gelismis dropdown have unique icons (not generic home icons).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (RMS page loads, all 8 Advanced modules navigable with unique icons)

seed_data_creation: None - RMS data is empty as expected (no comp-set or pricing data entered)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RMS Module endpoints are working correctly. The RMS page shows $0 values because no RMS data has been entered yet - this is expected behavior. All 8 Advanced modules (Revenue RMS, AI Modules, Revenue Engine, Data Intelligence, Messaging Center, ML Scheduler, Revenue Autopilot, Analytics Export) are accessible from the Gelismis dropdown with unique icons.

backend_apis.GET /api/rms/pricing-strategy: PASS - Returns current_rate, recommended_rate, auto_pricing_enabled, market_position
backend_apis.GET /api/rms/demand-forecast?days=7: PASS - Returns {forecast: [...], count: 7} with date and demand_index
backend_apis.GET /api/rms/demand-forecast?days=30: PASS - Returns 30 days of forecast data

frontend_ui.KPI cards displayed: PASS - Güncel ADR, Önerilen ADR, Rakip Set Ort., Pazar Pozisyonu
frontend_ui.Demand chart displayed: PASS - 30 Günlük Talep Tahmini chart with data

frontend_ui.Tables displayed: PASS - Rakip Set Detayı table, Son Fiyat Güncellemeleri section
